name: United Urology Group
message: United Urology Group’s affiliate practices around the country provide a comprehensive array of services to treat a wide range of urologic conditions in men, women, and in some cases, children. An integrated approach to care means patients have access to specially-trained and highly experienced urologic specialists, a support team of healthcare professionals, advanced diagnostics and treatments, leading-edge surgical techniques, state-of-the-art outpatient surgery centers, as well as clinical trials.
